headline: Is Tyson Foods (TSN) Undervalued As Earnings And Legal Risks Stay In Focus?
summary: Tyson Foods stock reacts to class action backdrop and earnings focus Tyson Foods (TSN) is back in focus as Canadian beef price fixing class actions continue alongside peers. Analysts are paying close attention to earnings estimate revisions and expectations for the current quarter. With some competitors agreeing to nearly US$8 million in proposed settlements that require court approval, investors are watching how ongoing litigation involving Tyson Foods intersects with projections for US$1.01...
